$schema.description: Optional URL of the JSON Schema this config conforms to. Editors and json-schema-aware tools use this for completion and validation; the action itself does not require it.
$schema.title: JSON Schema reference

description: Input configuration for the Silk Release Action. Sourced (in precedence order) from the `sbom-config` action input, the `.github/silk-release.json` file in the repository, and the `SILK_RELEASE_SBOM_TEMPLATE` environment variable. Only the `sbom` section is consumed by Phase 2 today; the top-level shape leaves room for future release-related sections.
title: Silk Release Action input config

authors.description: Author contacts written to the BOM's `metadata.authors`. Used when `package.json` `author`/`contributors` are insufficient or need explicit override.
authors.title: Authors

publisher.description: Publisher name written to the BOM's `metadata.component.publisher`. Defaults to the supplier name when unset.
publisher.title: Publisher

documentationUrl.description: Documentation URL written to the BOM as an external reference of type 'documentation'. Typically the project's docs site or repository docs path.
documentationUrl.title: Documentation URL

SbomConfig.description: SBOM metadata applied during the validation phase. Merged over auto-inferred values from each package's `package.json` by `resolveSBOMMetadata` ã explicit config wins. Field names match the prior `SBOMMetadataConfig` consumers so the schema is wire-compatible with existing configs.
SbomConfig.title: SBOM Configuration

name.description: Supplier display name. Required when a supplier block is provided ã this is the NTIA minimum-elements 'Supplier Name' field that compliance checks key on.
name.title: Supplier name

url.description: One supplier URL or an array of URLs. The scalar-or-array form is normalised by `resolveSBOMMetadata`; both shapes are accepted by Phase 2.
url.title: Supplier URL(s)

contact.description: One contact object or an array of contacts. The scalar-or-array form is normalised by `resolveSBOMMetadata`; both shapes are accepted by Phase 2.
contact.title: Supplier contact(s)

SbomSupplier.description: The NTIA minimum-elements 'Supplier Name' entity for the SBOM. Emitted on the BOM's `metadata.supplier` and used to satisfy the supplier-name NTIA compliance check.
SbomSupplier.title: SBOM Supplier

name.description: Display name of the contact person or team.
name.title: Contact name

email.description: Email address used to reach the contact.
email.title: Contact email

phone.description: Phone number used to reach the contact, in E.164 format when possible.
phone.title: Contact phone

SbomContact.description: A contact person or team associated with an SBOM supplier, author, or security entry. All fields are optional, but at least one should be set for the contact to be useful.
SbomContact.title: SBOM contact

holder.description: Copyright holder name. Appears in the BOM's `metadata.component.copyright` formatted as 'Copyright (c) <range> <holder>'.
holder.title: Copyright holder

startYear.description: Year the copyright begins, used to format a year range against the current year. Most users should NOT set this ã it is auto-detected from the npm registry's first-publication date. Override only when registry lookup is unreliable or the copyright predates first npm publication.
startYear.title: Copyright start year

SbomCopyright.description: Copyright metadata applied to every released package's BOM. Merged over auto-inferred defaults ã explicit config wins.
SbomCopyright.title: SBOM Copyright
